content: Read api.js & closet route registration to understand HTTP client + endpoint mount path
Fix A — invert backfill priority in /preflight (server, server-side only)
Backend B.1 — add image_hash.recompute_from_image helper that prefers original_image_url
Backend B.2 — new POST /api/v1/closet/repair-hashes streaming endpoint (NDJSON)
Frontend streaming infra — add streamNdjson helper in api.js
Frontend B.3 — closetStore.repairHashes() consumes stream + updates repairProgress
Frontend B.4 — auto-trigger repair after prewarm (once per session, idempotent)
Frontend B.5 — non-blocking progress chip in Closet header
i18n strings + lint sweep + smoke test (curl backend, screenshot frontend)
